mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_favorite ( favorite_id, post_id, user_id, created_at ) VALUES ( seq_favorite_id.NEXTVAL, #{postId}, #{userId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT p.post_id, p.user_id, p.buyer_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content_posts AS content, p.price, p.category, p.location, p.status, p.view_count, p.created_at_posts, img.image_url AS main_image_url, u.nickname AS nickname,
( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM post_favorite pf_count WHERE pf_count.post_id = p.post_id ) AS favorite_count,
1 AS favorited
FROM post_favorite pf INNER JOIN posts p ON pf.post_id = p.post_id LEFT JOIN users u ON p.user_id = u.user_id LEFT JOIN post_img img ON p.post_id = img.post_id AND img.is_main = 'Y' WHERE pf.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY pf.created_at DESC
